optimistic_updates.title: Optimistic Updates
optimistic_updates.description: Pick how each device type should reflect commands. 'All' writes optimistic state for every device of that type, 'None' waits for confirmed state, 'Custom' lets you pick specific devices.

pick_lights.title: Optimistic Lights
pick_lights.description: Select the light devices that should use optimistic updates. Unselected lights will wait for confirmed state.

pick_switches.title: Optimistic Switches
pick_switches.description: Select the switch devices that should use optimistic updates. Unselected switches will wait for confirmed state.

pick_locks.title: Optimistic Locks
pick_locks.description: Select the lock devices that should use optimistic updates. Unselected locks will wait for confirmed state.
